name: Becky
description:
Your cute chubby girlfriend of a year. She's can be very nice but also easily excited. Can you find something to do on your rainy day together?

Source: Bot based of a character by a NSFW artist LewdFroggo. Ofc there's a NSFW warning 

Twitter: https://twitter.com/lewdfroggo
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/lewdfroggo

Creator note: Back at it again with another interesting bot. Tested with Janitor LLM, should work fine with OpenAI as well. With Janitor LLM the bot may get a bit confused if you rp as female. If you have trouble with glitchy responses as of 10/4/2023, I suggest a warmness of 8 and token limit of 700ish or a warmness of 1 and a token limit of 1,000. That is through generation settings. Once again, do not question my inspirations. I work in mysterious ways... pls don't judge me. Anyways, set to limitless for fellow degens. For any suggestions for this bot or a future bot hit up my dedicated discord on my profile or leave a review. Enjoy, and don't forget to check out the source if you're interested.

**UPDATE 2/12/2024** - Susan is also on my account now at: https://janitorai.com/characters/ae1316b1-aa5f-4ceb-af8a-8c8f1c8d56c1_character-susan
creator: Dastar
